<!--
Thanks for contributing! A few things to save us both time:

- For a sizable change, please open an issue first to align on the approach.
- Security-sensitive fixes: follow SECURITY.md, not a public PR.
- Keep the PR focused. If you found unrelated cleanups, split them into
  separate PRs.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (DSL, file format, or public API)
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Docs / tests only

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Refs #456 -->

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? What should a reviewer click through?
     Include manual test steps for UI changes. -->

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Relevant e2e specs run locally (`npx playwright test`)
- [ ] Manually exercised the affected flow in the browser

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes. -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Trade-offs, follow-ups, or context you want called out. -->
